3233930.name: Rushmith(ラッシュミス)
3233930.description:
Faster! More carefully!

This is a mini-game in which you have to build as many weapons as possible within a limited time limit of 120 seconds, making full use of various skills. Online ranking will be available so that players can compete with other players for the record!

Players select buffs and tasks, and then work on the weapons presented to them.

The weapon will be completed as the process progresses.

When the weapon reaches the quality of the finished product, the player presses the “Finish” button to complete the weapon! The player can then immediately move on to the next stage of production!
